snippets: The Tourist Information office in Amberg is operated by the Amt für Tourismusförderung Amberg.
The Tourist Information office is located at Hallplatz 2.
The postal code of the Tourist Information office is 92224.
The Tourist Information office is located in Amberg.
The main phone number of the Tourist Information is +49 (0)9621 – 10-1233.
An additional phone number for the Tourist Information is +49 (0)9621 – 10-1239.
The official email address of the Tourist Information is tourismus@amberg.de.
The Tourist Information has public opening hours for visitors.
The Tourist Information is open on Mondays.
The Tourist Information is open on Tuesdays.
The Tourist Information is open on Wednesdays.
The Tourist Information is open on Thursdays.
The Tourist Information is open on Fridays.
The Tourist Information opening hours from Monday to Friday are 09:00 to 17:00.
The Tourist Information is open on Saturdays.
The Tourist Information opening hours on Saturdays are 10:00 to 13:00.
The Tourist Information has seasonal Sunday opening hours.
The Tourist Information is open on Sundays between 16 June and 15 September.
The Tourist Information opening hours on Sundays are 10:00 to 13:00 during this period.
The Tourist Information is open on public holidays between 16 June and 15 September.
The Tourist Information opening hours on public holidays are 10:00 to 13:00 during this period.
The Tourist Information is closed on 24 June 2026.
The Tourist Information provides telephone support separately from visitor hours.
Telephone support is available from Monday to Thursday.
Telephone support hours from Monday to Thursday are 08:00 to 16:00.
Telephone support is available on Fridays.
Telephone support hours on Fridays are 08:00 to 13:00.
Telephone support is not available on Saturdays.
Telephone support is not available on Sundays.
Telephone support is not available on public holidays.
The Tourist Information has an official Instagram presence.
The Instagram handle of the Tourist Information is @ambergtourismus.
The Tourist Information offers a newsletter subscription.
The newsletter can be accessed via the official tourism website.
